---
title: "Predator-prey (consumer-resource) interactions"
author: "Christopher Moore"
date: "Week 09 continued to Week 10"
output:
  xaringan::moon_reader:
    lib_dir: libs
    nature:
      highlightStyle: github
      highlightLines: true
      countIncrementalSlides: false
      beforeInit: "https://platform.twitter.com/widgets.js"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, collapse = T)
library(package = "deSolve")
library(package = "phaseR")
library(package = "animation")
```


class: inverse, center, middle

![Leopard seal 1](https://i.vimeocdn.com/video/562538814-12d6ad902d8f4d688234cccc01aa6de84182661bf6518d81aa991945ea7b1bde-d?mw=1100&mh=619&q=70)

# Predator-prey (consumer-resource) interactions

---

class: inverse, center, middle

![Leopard seal 2](https://cdn.roaring.earth/wp-content/uploads/2016/05/CATERS_Friendly_Leopard_Seal_06-1152x768.jpg)

---

class: inverse, center, middle

![Leopard seal 3](https://media.npr.org/assets/img/2017/06/06/leopard-seal-0012-7f54636843d529c8254527536f94c54dfa213d52-s800-c85.jpg)

[Link to interview about this shoot](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UmVWGvO8Yhk)

---

# Lotka-Volterra predator-prey
Putting the pieces together:
1. Prey growth, $+rR$
2. Predators removing prey, $-aRC$
3. Predator growth from eating prey, $+bRC$
4. Predators die, $-mC$

$$\begin{aligned}
\frac{dR}{dt} &= rR - aRC \\
\frac{dC}{dt} &= bRC - mC
\end{aligned}$$

---
# Lotka-Volterra predator-prey
The model
$$\begin{aligned}
F_1 = \frac{dR}{dt} &= rR - a RC\\
F_2 = \frac{dC}{dt} &= b RC - m C
\end{aligned}$$

--

Setting each subequation to 0
$$\begin{aligned}
F_1 = 0 &= rR - a RC\\
F_2 = 0 &= b RC - m C
\end{aligned}$$

--

.pull-left[
For $F_1$
$$\begin{aligned}
R^* &= 0 \\
C^* &= \frac{r}{a}
\end{aligned}$$
]

--

.pull-right[
For $F_2$
$$\begin{aligned}
C^* &= 0 \\
R^* &= \frac{m}{b}
\end{aligned}$$
]


---
# Lotka-Volterra predator-prey
The phase plane

```{r echo = F, warning = F, fig.width = 4, fig.height = 4, dpi = 110, message = F, results = 'hide'}
LV <- function(t, y, parameters) {
  R <- y[1]
  C <- y[2]
  r <- parameters[1]
  a <- parameters[2]
  b <- parameters[3]
  m <- parameters[4]
  dR <- r*R - a*R*C
  dC <- b*R*C - m*C
  return(list(c(dR, dC)))
}

init <- c(0.3, 0.5)
parm.vals <- c(r = 0.5, a = 0.5, b = 0.25, m = 0.5)
par(mar = c(0, 0, 0.1, 0.1), oma = c(4, 4, 0, 0))
flowField(deriv = LV, xlim = c(-0.01, 7), ylim = c(-0.01, 7), parameters = parm.vals, y = init, add = F, points = 20, las = 1, xaxs = "i", yaxs = "i")
nullclines(deriv = LV, parameters = parm.vals, xlim = c(-0.01, 7), ylim = c(-0.01, 7), add = T, lwd = 2, col = c("red", "blue"), add.legend = F)
mtext(side = 1, text = bquote(R), line = 2.5)
mtext(side = 2, text = bquote(C), line = 2.5, las = 1)
```

---
# Lotka-Volterra predator-prey
An instance

```{r LV, echo = F, message = FALSE, eval = F}
times <- seq(from = 0, to = 60, by = 0.1)
init <- c(0.3, 0.5)
crLV.out <- ode(y = init, fun = LV, parms = parm.vals, times = times)

saveVideo({
  time.seq <- times
  n.frames <- length(time.seq)
  total.time = 15
  ani.options(interval = total.time/n.frames, nmax = n.frames)

  for (i in 1:n.frames) {
  par(mar = c(4.5, 4.5, 0.2, 0.2), oma = rep(0, 4), mfrow = c(1, 2))
  plot(x = crLV.out[1:i,1], y = crLV.out[1:i,2], lwd = 2, las = 1, xlab = "Time", ylab = "Density", type = "l", ylim = c(0, max(crLV.out[,c(2,3)])), xlim = c(0, max(crLV.out[,1])), col = "blue")
  lines(x = crLV.out[1:i,1], y= crLV.out[1:i,3], lwd = 2, col = "red")
flowField(deriv = LV, xlim = c(-0.01, 7), ylim = c(-0.01, 7), parameters = parm.vals, y = init, add = F, points = 20, las = 1, xaxs = "i", yaxs = "i", col.lab = "white")
  nullclines(deriv = LV, parameters = parm.vals, xlim = c(-0.01, 7), ylim = c(-0.01, 7), add = T, lwd = 2, col = c("blue", "red"), add.legend = F)
points(x = crLV.out[i,2], y = crLV.out[i,3], pch = 16, cex = 1.5)
lines(x = crLV.out[1:i,2], y = crLV.out[1:i,3], lwd = 2)
mtext(side = 1, text = bquote(R), line = 2.5)
mtext(side = 2, text = bquote(C), line = 2.5, las = 1)
  }

  }, video.name = "Wk10_PredatorPreyCont_files/LV.mp4", ani.width = 800, ani.height = 400, ani.dev = function(...){png(res=100,...)}
)
```

<video width="800" height="400" controls loop>
  <source src="Wk10_PredatorPreyCont_files/LV.mp4" type="video/mp4">
</video>

---

# Some motivation from Twitter

<blockquote class="twitter-tweet"><p lang="en" dir="ltr">When students understand state space<br>the world is their oyster. <a href="https://t.co/AdydEUa0GW">https://t.co/AdydEUa0GW</a></p>&mdash; Mike Kaspari (@MikeKaspari) <a href="https://twitter.com/MikeKaspari/status/1115431411048165376?ref_src=twsrc%5Etfw">April 9, 2019</a></blockquote> <script async src="https://platform.twitter.com/widgets.js" charset="utf-8"></script>


---
# Lotka-Volterra with density dependence
Putting the pieces together:
1. Prey density-dependent growth, $+rR\frac{K-R}{K}$
2. Predators removing prey, $-aRC$
3. Predator growth from eating prey, $+bRC$
4. Predators die, $-mC$

$$\begin{aligned}
\frac{dR}{dt} &= rR\left(\frac{K - R}{K}\right) - aRC\\
\frac{dC}{dt} &= b RC - mC
\end{aligned}$$

---

# Lotka-Volterra with density dependence

$$\begin{aligned}
F_1 = \frac{dR}{dt} &= rR\left(\frac{K - R}{K}\right) - aRC\\
F_2 = \frac{dC}{dt} &= b RC - mC
\end{aligned}$$

--

Setting each subequation to 0
$$\begin{aligned}
F_1 = 0 &= rR\left(\frac{K - R}{K}\right) - aRC\\
F_2 = 0 &= b RC - mC
\end{aligned}$$

--

.pull-left[
For $F_1$
$$\begin{aligned}
R^* &= 0 \\
C &= \frac{r}{a} - \frac{r}{aK}R^*
\end{aligned}$$
]

--

.pull-right[
For $F_2$
$$\begin{aligned}
C^* &= 0 \\
R^* &= \frac{m}{b}
\end{aligned}$$
]


---
# Lotka-Volterra with density dependence

The model, initial densities, and parameter values
```{r}
LVDD <- function(t, y, parameters) {
  R <- y[1]
  C <- y[2]
  r <- parameters[1]
  alpha <- parameters[2]
  a <- parameters[3]
  b <- parameters[4]
  m <- parameters[5]
  K <- parameters[5]
  dR <- r*R*((K - R)/K) - a*R*C
  dC <- b*R*C - m*C
  return(list(c(dR, dC)))
}

init <- c(0.3, 0.5)
parm.vals <- c(r = 0.5, a = 0.25, b = 0.25, m = 2, K = 2.5)
```

---
# Lotka-Volterra with density dependence

The phase plane
```{r echo = F, warning = F, fig.width = 4, fig.height = 4, dpi = 110, message = F, results = 'hide'}
par(mar = c(0, 0, 0.1, 0.1), oma = c(4, 4, 0, 0))
a <- flowField(deriv = LVDD, xlim = c(-0.01, 3), ylim = c(-0.01, 3), parameters = parm.vals, y = init, add = F, points = 20, las = 1, xaxs = "i", yaxs = "i")
a <- nullclines(deriv = LVDD, parameters = parm.vals, xlim = c(-0.01, 3), ylim = c(-0.01, 3), add = T, lwd = 2, col = c("red", "blue"), add.legend = F)
mtext(side = 1, text = bquote(R), line = 2.5)
mtext(side = 2, text = bquote(C), line = 2.5, las = 1)
```

---
# Lotka-Volterra with density dependence

```{r LVDD, echo = F, message = FALSE, eval = F}
times <- seq(from = 0, to = 30, by = 0.1)
init <- c(0.5, 0.5)
LVDD.out <- ode(y = init, fun = LVDD, parms = parm.vals, times = times)

saveVideo({
  time.seq <- times
  n.frames <- length(time.seq)
  total.time = 15
  ani.options(interval = total.time/n.frames, nmax = n.frames)

  for (i in 1:n.frames) {
  par(mar = c(4.5, 4.5, 0.2, 0.2), oma = rep(0, 4), mfrow = c(1, 2))
  plot(x = LVDD.out[1:i,1], y = LVDD.out[1:i,2], lwd = 2, las = 1, xlab = "Time", ylab = "Density", type = "l", ylim = c(0, max(LVDD.out[,c(2,3)])), xlim = c(0, max(LVDD.out[,1])), col = "#0000FFFF")
  lines(x = LVDD.out[1:i,1], y= LVDD.out[1:i,3], lwd = 2, col = "red")
a <- flowField(deriv = LVDD, xlim = c(-0.01, 3), ylim = c(-0.01, 3), parameters = parm.vals, y = init, add = F, points = 20, las = 1, xaxs = "i", yaxs = "i", col.lab = "white")
a <- nullclines(deriv = LVDD, parameters = parm.vals, xlim = c(-0.01, 3), ylim = c(-0.01, 3), add = T, lwd = 2, col = c("red", "blue"), add.legend = F)
points(x = LVDD.out[i,2], y = LVDD.out[i,3], pch = 16, cex = 1.5)
lines(x = LVDD.out[1:i,2], y = LVDD.out[1:i,3], lwd = 2)
mtext(side = 1, text = bquote(R), line = 2.5)
mtext(side = 2, text = bquote(C), line = 2.5, las = 1)
  }

  }, video.name = "Wk10_PredatorPreyCont_files/LVDD.mp4", ani.width = 800, ani.height = 400, ani.dev = function(...){png(res=100,...)}
)
```

<video width="800" height="400" controls loop>
  <source src="Wk10_PredatorPreyCont_files/LVDD.mp4" type="video/mp4">
</video>

---

# Lotka-Volterra with Type II functional response (FR)
Putting the pieces together:
1. Prey growth, $+rR$
2. Predators removing prey, $-\frac{cR}{g + R}C$
3. Predator growth from eating prey, $+\frac{bR}{g + R}C$
4. Predators die, $-mC$

$$\begin{aligned}
\frac{dR}{dt} &= rR - \frac{cR}{g + R}C\\
\frac{dC}{dt} &= \frac{bR}{g + R}C - mC
\end{aligned}$$

---

# Lotka-Volterra with Type II FR

$$\begin{aligned}
F_1 = \frac{dR}{dt} &= rR - \frac{cR}{g + R}C\\
F_2 = \frac{dC}{dt} &= \frac{bR}{g + R}C - mC
\end{aligned}$$

--

Setting each subequation to 0

$$\begin{aligned}
F_1 = 0 &= rR - \frac{cR}{g + R}C\\
F_2 = 0 &= \frac{bR}{g + R}C - mC
\end{aligned}$$

--

.pull-left[
For $F_1$
$$\begin{aligned}
R^* &= 0 \\
C &= \frac{rg}{c} + \frac{r}{c}R
\end{aligned}$$
]

--

.pull-right[
For $F_2$
$$\begin{aligned}
C^* &= 0 \\
R^* &= \frac{mg}{b - m}
\end{aligned}$$
]


---
# Lotka-Volterra with Type II FR

The model, initial densities, and parameter values
```{r}
LVFR <- function(t, y, parameters) {
  R <- y[1]
  C <- y[2]
  r <- parameters[1]
  a <- parameters[2]
  b <- parameters[3]
  m <- parameters[4]
  c <- parameters[5]
  g <- parameters[6]
  dR <- r*R - c*R*C/(g + R)
  dC <- b*R*C/(g + R) - m*C
  return(list(c(dR, dC)))
}

init <- c(0.3, 0.5)
parm.vals <- c(r = 0.1, a = 0.25, b = 1.5, m = 0.75, c = 0.5, g = 1)
```

---
# Lotka-Volterra with Type II FR

The phase plane
```{r echo = F, warning = F, fig.width = 4, fig.height = 4, dpi = 110, message = F, results = 'hide'}
par(mar = c(0, 0, 0.1, 0.1), oma = c(4, 4, 0, 0))
a <- flowField(deriv = LVFR, xlim = c(-0.01, 3), ylim = c(-0.01, 3), parameters = parm.vals, y = init, add = F, points = 20, las = 1, xaxs = "i", yaxs = "i")
a <- nullclines(deriv = LVFR, parameters = parm.vals, xlim = c(-0.01, 3), ylim = c(-0.01, 3), add = T, lwd = 2, col = c("red", "blue"), add.legend = F)
mtext(side = 1, text = bquote(R), line = 2.5)
mtext(side = 2, text = bquote(C), line = 2.5, las = 1)
```

---
# Lotka-Volterra with Type II FR

```{r LVFR, echo = F, message = FALSE, eval = F}
times <- seq(from = 0, to = 100, by = 0.1)
init <- c(1, 0.51)
LVFR.out <- ode(y = init, fun = LVFR, parms = parm.vals, times = times)

saveVideo({
  time.seq <- times
  n.frames <- length(time.seq)
  total.time = 15
  ani.options(interval = total.time/n.frames, nmax = n.frames)

  for (i in 1:n.frames) {
  par(mar = c(4.5, 4.5, 0.2, 0.2), oma = rep(0, 4), mfrow = c(1, 2))
  plot(x = LVFR.out[1:i,1], y = LVFR.out[1:i,2], lwd = 2, las = 1, xlab = "Time", ylab = "Density", type = "l", ylim = c(0, max(LVFR.out[,c(2,3)])), xlim = c(0, max(LVFR.out[,1])), col = "#0000FFFF")
  lines(x = LVFR.out[1:i,1], y = LVFR.out[1:i,3], lwd = 2, col = "red")
a <- flowField(deriv = LVFR, xlim = c(-0.01, 3), ylim = c(-0.01, 3), parameters = parm.vals, y = init, add = F, points = 20, las = 1, xaxs = "i", yaxs = "i", col.lab = "white")
a <- nullclines(deriv = LVFR, parameters = parm.vals, xlim = c(-0.01, 3), ylim = c(-0.01, 3), add = T, lwd = 2, col = c("red", "blue"), add.legend = F)
points(x = LVFR.out[i,2], y = LVFR.out[i,3], pch = 16, cex = 1.5)
lines(x = LVFR.out[1:i,2], y = LVFR.out[1:i,3], lwd = 2)
mtext(side = 1, text = bquote(R), line = 2.5)
mtext(side = 2, text = bquote(C), line = 2.5, las = 1)
  }

  }, video.name = "Wk10_PredatorPreyCont_files/LVFR.mp4", ani.width = 800, ani.height = 400, ani.dev = function(...){png(res=100,...)}
)
```

<video width="800" height="400" controls loop>
  <source src="Wk10_PredatorPreyCont_files/LVFR.mp4" type="video/mp4">
</video>

---
# Lotka-Volterra with Type II functional response (FR) & Density Dependence (DD)
Putting the pieces together:
1. Prey density-dependent growth, $+rR\left(\frac{K - R}{K}\right)$
2. Predators removing prey, $-\frac{cR}{g + R}C$
3. Predator growth from eating prey, $+\frac{bR}{g + R}C$
4. Predators die, $-mC$

$$\begin{aligned}
\frac{dR}{dt} &= rR\left(\frac{K - R}{K}\right) - \frac{cR}{g + R}C\\
\frac{dC}{dt} &= \frac{bR}{g + R}C - mC
\end{aligned}$$

---

# Lotka-Volterra with FR & DD

$$\begin{aligned}
F_1 = \frac{dR}{dt} &= rR\left(\frac{K - R}{K}\right) - \frac{cR}{g + R}C\\
F_2 = \frac{dC}{dt} &= \frac{bR}{g + R}C - mC
\end{aligned}$$

--

Setting each subequation to 0

$$\begin{aligned}
F_1 = 0 &= rR\left(\frac{K - R}{K}\right) - \frac{cR}{g + R}C\\
F_2 = 0 &= \frac{bR}{g + R}C - mC
\end{aligned}$$

--

.pull-left[
For $F_1$
$$\begin{aligned}
R^* &= 0 \\
C &= \frac{r\left(1 - \frac{R}{K}\right)(g + R)}{c}
\end{aligned}$$
]

--

.pull-right[
For $F_2$
$$\begin{aligned}
C^* &= 0 \\
R^* &= \frac{mg}{b - m}
\end{aligned}$$
]


---

# Lotka-Volterra with FR & DD

The model, initial densities, and parameter values
```{r}
LVFRDD <- function(t, y, parameters) {
  R <- y[1]
  C <- y[2]
  r <- parameters["r"]
  a <- parameters["a"]
  b <- parameters["b"]
  m <- parameters["m"]
  c <- parameters["c"]
  g <- parameters["g"]
  K <- parameters["K"]
  dR <- r*R*((K - R) /K) - c*R*C/(g + R)
  dC <- b*R*C/(g + R) - m*C
  return(list(c(dR, dC)))
}

init <- c(0.3, 0.5)
parm.vals <- c(r = 0.5, a = 0.25, b = 1.5, m = 0.75, c = 0.5, g = 1, K = 2.5)
```

---
# Lotka-Volterra with FR & DD

The phase plane
```{r echo = F, warning = F, fig.width = 4, fig.height = 4, dpi = 110, message = F, results = 'hide'}
par(mar = c(0, 0, 0.1, 0.1), oma = c(4, 4, 0, 0))
a <- flowField(deriv = LVFRDD, xlim = c(-0.01, 3), ylim = c(-0.01, 3), parameters = parm.vals, y = init, add = F, points = 20, las = 1, xaxs = "i", yaxs = "i")
a <- nullclines(deriv = LVFRDD, parameters = parm.vals, xlim = c(-0.01, 3), ylim = c(-0.01, 3), add = T, lwd = 2, col = c("red", "blue"), add.legend = F)
mtext(side = 1, text = bquote(R), line = 2.5)
mtext(side = 2, text = bquote(C), line = 2.5, las = 1)
```

---
# Lotka-Volterra with FR & DD

The predator isocline could increase or decrease

```{r LVFRDD, echo = F, message = FALSE, eval = F}
times <- seq(from = 0, to = 120, by = 0.1)
init <- c(1, 0.51)
parm.vals <- c(r = 0.5, a = 0.25, b = 1.5, m = 0.75, c = 0.5, g = 1, K = 2.5)
m.seq <- seq(from = 0.25, to = 1.1, length.out = 1000)

saveVideo({
  n.frames <- length(m.seq)
  total.time <- 10
  ani.options(interval = total.time/n.frames, nmax = n.frames)

  for (i in 1:n.frames) {
  parm.vals["m"] <- m.seq[i]
  LVFRDD.out <- ode(y = init, fun = LVFRDD, parms = parm.vals, times = times)

  par(mar = c(4.5, 4.5, 0.2, 0.2), oma = rep(0, 4), mfrow = c(1, 2))
  plot(x = LVFRDD.out[,1], y = LVFRDD.out[,2], lwd = 2, las = 1, xlab = "Time", ylab = "Density", type = "l", ylim = c(0, 3), xlim = c(0, max(LVFRDD.out[,1])), col = "#0000FFFF")
  lines(x = LVFRDD.out[,1], y = LVFRDD.out[,3], lwd = 2, col = "red")
a <- flowField(deriv = LVFRDD, xlim = c(-0.01, 3), ylim = c(-0.01, 3), parameters = parm.vals, y = init, add = F, points = 20, las = 1, xaxs = "i", yaxs = "i", col.lab = "white")
a <- nullclines(deriv = LVFRDD, parameters = parm.vals, xlim = c(-0.01, 3), ylim = c(-0.01, 3), add = T, lwd = 2, col = c("red", "blue"), add.legend = F)
points(x = init[1], y = init[2], pch = 16, cex = 1.25)
lines(x = LVFRDD.out[,2], y = LVFRDD.out[,3], lwd = 2)
mtext(side = 1, text = bquote(R), line = 2.5)
mtext(side = 2, text = bquote(C), line = 2.5, las = 1)
  }

  }, video.name = "Wk10_PredatorPreyCont_files/LVFRDD.mp4", ani.width = 800, ani.height = 400, ani.dev = function(...){png(res=100,...)}
)
```

<video width="800" height="400" controls loop>
  <source src="Wk10_PredatorPreyCont_files/LVFRDD.mp4" type="video/mp4">
</video>

---
# Lotka-Volterra with FR & DD

The prey isocline changing by increasing the equilibrium value, $K$

```{r LVFRDDK, echo = F, message = FALSE, eval = F}
times <- seq(from = 0, to = 120, by = 0.1)
init <- c(1, 0.51)
parm.vals <- c(r = 0.5, a = 0.25, b = 1.5, m = 0.85, c = 0.5, g = 1, K = 2.5)
K.seq <- seq(from = 0.9, to = 5, length.out = 1000)

saveVideo({
  n.frames <- length(K.seq)
  total.time <- 10
  ani.options(interval = total.time/n.frames, nmax = n.frames)

  for (i in 1:n.frames) {
  parm.vals["K"] <- K.seq[i]
  LVFRDD.out <- ode(y = init, fun = LVFRDD, parms = parm.vals, times = times)

  par(mar = c(4.5, 4.5, 0.2, 0.2), oma = rep(0, 4), mfrow = c(1, 2))
  plot(x = LVFRDD.out[,1], y = LVFRDD.out[,2], lwd = 2, las = 1, xlab = "Time", ylab = "Density", type = "l", ylim = c(0, 3), xlim = c(0, max(LVFRDD.out[,1])), col = "#0000FFFF")
  lines(x = LVFRDD.out[,1], y = LVFRDD.out[,3], lwd = 2, col = "red")
  legend(x = "topright", legend = paste0("K = ", sprintf("%.2f", parm.vals["K"])), bg = "#FFFFFFAA")
a <- flowField(deriv = LVFRDD, xlim = c(-0.01, 3), ylim = c(-0.01, 3), parameters = parm.vals, y = init, add = F, points = 20, las = 1, xaxs = "i", yaxs = "i", col.lab = "white")
a <- nullclines(deriv = LVFRDD, parameters = parm.vals, xlim = c(-0.01, 3), ylim = c(-0.01, 3), add = T, lwd = 2, col = c("red", "blue"), add.legend = F)
points(x = init[1], y = init[2], pch = 16, cex = 1.25)
lines(x = LVFRDD.out[,2], y = LVFRDD.out[,3], lwd = 2)
mtext(side = 1, text = bquote(R), line = 2.5)
mtext(side = 2, text = bquote(C), line = 2.5, las = 1)
  }

  }, video.name = "Wk10_PredatorPreyCont_files/LVFRDD_K.mp4", ani.width = 800, ani.height = 400, ani.dev = function(...){png(res=100,...)}
)
```

<video width="800" height="400" controls loop>
  <source src="Wk10_PredatorPreyCont_files/LVFRDD_K.mp4" type="video/mp4">
</video>
